synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-0624 Oracle Linux 9 .NET 8.0 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0624
description:
[8.0.123-1.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[8.0.123-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 8.0.123 and Runtime 8.0.23
- Resolves: RHEL-138654
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0624

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0624.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
aspnetcore-runtime-8.0-8.0.23-1.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
aspnetcore-runtime-dbg-8.0-8.0.23-1.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/dotnet8.0-8.0.123-1.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[8.0.123-1.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[8.0.123-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 8.0.123 and Runtime 8.0.23
- Resolves: RHEL-138654
